titleStmt.title: SII 18.106: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 106. (B.K. No. 76 of 1933-34.) SŌMĀPUR, NARGUND PETHA, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying in the temple of Hanumān.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 27, Chitrabhānu, Jyēshṭha Pūrṇimā, Sunday, corresponding probably to A.D. 1102, June 2. The week-day was Monday. The tithi however commenced on Sunday at ·97.
It states that the Mahājanas of Mekkegēri made a grant of certain incomes to a god (name lost).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: Written in continuation of No. 89 above.
div.p:
© svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavarṣada 17 neya citrabhānusaṁvatsarada cyēṣṭhada puṇname Ādityavāradaṁdu śrīmanmekkegēri
ya mahājana mūvattaivaruvaśēṣamiḻdu nugeṁ naḍeva pratiyokkalaloṁda kaṁbaḷavāgamumaṁ Akkasāladadeseya hēṟiṁge nū
ṟeleyāyamuṁ maṇḍageṟege biṭṭaru . Intī dharmmamaṁ svadharmmadiṁ caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ pratipāḷisidavargge gaṁgeya
taḍiyoḷsāsira kavileya kōḍuṁkoḷagumaṁ ponnoḷkaṭṭisi sāsirvvaru vēdapāragarige koṭṭa puṇyamakku Ī dharmmamanupē
kṣisi kiḍisidavargge gaṁgeya taḍiyoḷsāsira kavileyumaṁ sāsirvvaruṁ brāhmaṇarumanaḷida pātakarappar .
Digital edition of SII 18.106 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
